title: Review queue persistence — data/pending-category-reviews.json
task: Create src/PendingReviewService.js with JSON file persistence at data/pending-category-reviews.json. Implement CRUD: loadReviews(), saveReviews(), addReview(review), acceptReview(id, chosenCategory), rejectReview(id), getPendingReviews(), getAllReviews(). Duplicate check on addReview (same transactionId + status=pending). Async serialization per DEC-0013.
acceptance: addReview() checks for duplicate (same transactionId + status=pending) — returns existing
addReview() prepends new review (unshift) and saves
acceptReview(id, chosenCategory) sets status='accepted', resolvedAt, resolvedBy='operator', resolvedChoice
rejectReview(id) sets status='rejected', resolvedAt, resolvedBy='operator', resolvedChoice=null
